description: John Zenon, an environmental sanitation worker, sustained a needlestick injury from an unknown source while handling medical waste. As the occupational health clinician, initiate the Post-Exposure Prophylaxis (PEP) protocol in GNU Health: document the exposure/needlestick diagnosis, order baseline serology laboratories (at least 2 tests, e.g., HIV, Hepatitis), prescribe an antiretroviral PEP medication (e.g., Zidovudine, Lamivudine, Tenofovir, or other available antiviral), and schedule a mandatory follow-up appointment 28 to 35 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
